message:
fix(db): add explicit "cursor must be on a leaf" recovery pattern

Belt-and-suspenders addition to is_sqlite_recovery_error_message():
the pattern was already caught by the "internal error" substring match,
but adding the explicit check ensures recovery works even if FrankenSQLite
changes its error format in the future.

Closes #7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -854,6 +854,7 @@ pub fn is_sqlite_recovery_error_message(message: &str) -> bool {
         || lower.contains("cursor stack is empty")
         || lower.contains("called `option::unwrap()` on a `none` value")
         || lower.contains("internal error")
+        || lower.contains("cursor must be on a leaf")
 }
 
 #[must_use]
